name: Hobby Finder
description: Discover new hobbies based on your interests and lifestyle

agents.name: Hobby Researcher
agents.purpose: Research hobbies matching the user's profile
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research hobbies matching the user's interests, available time, budget, and physical ability. Find beginner-friendly options, local resources, online communities, and equipment costs.

agents.name: Hobby Advisor
agents.system_prompt_hint: Recommend 10 hobbies with: description, why it fits the user, difficulty level, startup cost, time commitment, how to start (first 3 steps), local/online resources, and community links. Group by category: creative, physical, intellectual, social.

suggestion_card.title: Hobby Finder
suggestion_card.subtitle: Discover new hobbies
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Find hobbies for someone who likes [interests]

author: agentfactory
